data.title: Ferrellgas names Raudel Arriaga as one of Samsara’s top 100 Fleet Operators to Watch in 2026.
data.description: A recent report has revealed that the global unemployment rate has reached its highest level in a decade, with approximately 220 million people currently out of work. This marks a significant increase from previous years, with youth unemployment being particularly high at 13.6%. The COVID-19 pandemic has greatly contributed to this rise in unemployment, with many businesses forced to close their doors or reduce their workforce. Governments around the world are implementing various measures to address the economic impact of the pandemic and support those who are unemployed. The situation remains uncertain, with experts warning that it may take years for the global economy to fully recover from the effects of the pandemic.

data.title: NGU Sports Lighting Launches Performance Lighting Delivered, Removing Financial Barriers to LED Sports Lighting
data.description: NGU Sports Lighting recently announced the availability of Power Lighting District (PLD), a revolutionary program that allows districtwide, citywide, and campus-wide sports lighting upgrades without any upfront capital investment required. Some of the initial users of this new program are Syracuse City School District and the University of South Carolina. This initiative is expected to have a significant impact, providing improved lighting solutions and energy efficiency to numerous facilities. The announcement was made on March 26, 2026, in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida.

data.title: Healthcare Digital Wins 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award for Nutrition AI, Developed in Collaboration with Morrison Healthcare
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - A division of Compass Healthcare, Healthcare Digital, received the prestigious 2026 Artificial Intelligence Excellence Award for its groundbreaking Nutrition AI solution.

data.title: Diligent Elevate 2026 Unites AI-Era GRC Leaders in Atlanta
data.description: Diligent, a top AI provider of governance, risk, and compliance solutions, disclosed updates for Elevate 2026, its flagship yearly conference for GRC and audit experts. Scheduled for April 22 – 24, 2026, at the Hilton Atlanta in downtown Atlanta, GA, Elevate 2026 aims to assist GRC professionals in adapting to increasing business intricacies and effectively utilizing AI. The event is curated to empower GRC specialists to become proficient AI leaders.

data.title: THE CULINARY INSTITUTE OF AMERICA ANNOUNCES NEW TRUSTEES
data.description: In Hyde Park, New York, on March 26, 2026, the Culinary Institute of America (CIA) announced the appointment of four experienced professionals to its Board of Trustees. These individuals bring diverse expertise in leadership, technology, franchising, hospitality solutions, and communications to the institution. The newly appointed trustees are set to contribute their knowledge and skills to further enhance the CIA's strategic direction and operations.

data.title: WeInfuse Launches InfuseTrack to Bring Real-Time Visibility, Control, and Compliance to Infusion Asset Management
data.description: A new software platform called InfuseTrack has been developed by WeInfuse to simplify facility, equipment, and license management for various healthcare facilities including infusion centers, specialty pharmacies, home infusion providers, and hospital outpatient departments. The platform aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency in these settings. The launch took place in Dallas on March 26, 2026.
